title: srg.id.au
summary: is my personal portfolio site, built with Zola and hosted on Cloudflare Pages.

title: Scalpel
summary: is a surgical rotation assistant with rapid procedure guides, anatomy references, and quick answers.

title: Cardz
summary: was a quiz-generation app that turned textbooks into study decks with a single click.

title: SixtySecondShell
summary: was a timed terminal challenge where users had sixty seconds to experiment with more than 100 programming languages.

title: DevPlatform
summary: was a browser-based cloud development environment with provisioning, access control, and built-in IDE workflows.

title: Ultramarine
summary: was an ephemeral end-to-end encrypted chat tool that worked without a database and left no messages behind.

title: Notion Reading List
summary: lets you maintain Notion reading lists by automatically fetching book covers and metadata.
